examples: Salary will be commensurate with experience.
Employees are paid salaries commensurate with those of teachers.
The effusiveness and time spent in giving praise should be commensurate with the difficulty and time-intensiveness of the task.
Yet, despite their dedication, the pay they receive is not commensurate with their time and effort.
But he burped instead, a tiny little noise, commensurate with what he had eaten.
